title: Proposal for a Council Decision on the position to be taken by the Community within the Association Council established by the Europe Agreement between the European Communities and their Member States, of the one part, and the Republic of Latvia, of the other part, signed on 12 June 1995, with regard to the adoption of the modifications to Protocol 3 of the Europe Agreement included in Joint Committee Decision No 1/97 of 20 March 1997 under the Agreement on Free Trade and Trade Related Matters between the European Communities and their Member States, of the one part, and the Republic of Latvia, of the other part, signed on 18 July 1994
